info.name: MITO MTO Submission API
info.description: Postman Collection for MITO Money Transfer Operator (MTO) Submission API endpoints.

request.description: Retrieve real-time exchange rates for money transfer, mobile top-up, and bill collections available on your affiliate profile.

body.raw:
{
  "Mtn": "MTO-987654321",
  "Rate": 1.15,
  "SettlementCurrency": "GBP",
  "PayoutCurrency": "CAD",
  "SendingCountryISO": "GBR",
  "ReceivingCountryISO": "CAD",
  "TransactionType": "MONEYTRANSFER",
  "CollectionMode": "BANKACCOUNT",
  "PurposeCode": "FAMILY_SUPPORT",
  "sourceOfFund": "SALARY",
  "CreationDate": "2026-06-15T12:00:00Z",
  "PayoutPrincipal": 1150.00,
  "SettlementAmount": 1000.00,
  "TotalSale": 1000.00,
  "ServiceProviderCode": "FGCGENERIC",
  "ServiceProviderName": "Royal Bank of Canada",
  "BankAccountNumber": "1234567890",
  "sender": {
    "FirstName": "John",
    "LastName": "Doe",
    "MobileNumber": "447700900077",
    "gender": "Male",
    "nationality": "GBR",
    "countryOfBirth": "GBR",
    "RelationshipCode": "FAMILY",
    "occupationCode": "ENGINEER",
    "EmploymentStatus": "EMPLOYED",
    "Address": {
      "addressLine1": "10 Downing Street",
      "country": "GBR",
      "postCode": "SW1A 2AA"
    },
    "IdDocument": {
      "type": "PASSPORT",
      "number": "987654321",
      "issueDate": "2020-01-01",
      "expiryDate": "2030-01-01",
      "placeOfIssue": "GBR"
    }
  },
  "Beneficiary": {
    "firstName": "Jane",
    "lastName": "Doe",
    "mobileNumber": "15140001111",
    "nationality": "CAN",
    "Address": {
      "addressLine1": "100 Queen Street",
      "country": "CAN"
    }
  }
}

request.description: Submit payment details to process a remittance transfer, mobile top-up, or bill collection.
Validate the beneficiary's bank account details before initiating a transaction to reduce errors.
